subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Nazir! We have turned unto thee, inasmuch as thou didst turn unto God, the Lord of all worlds, and have directed Our gaze toward thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الناظر قد اقبلنا الیک بما اقبلت الی الله رب العالمین و توجهنا الیک
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @high station of the true believer, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
